description:
Ramps up users of a specified type, observing resulting throughput.

monitoring.benchmarker.configurations.loads.UserRampLoad, as defined in monitoring/benchmarker/configurations/loads.py

$ref.description: Path to content that replaces the $ref

additional_users_per_step.description: Additional users to add at each step along the ramp.

initial_users.description: Number of users to start with.

load_completion_criteria.description: The load is considered complete if these criteria are met.

step_completion_criteria.description: The current step is considered complete once these criteria are met.

throughput_stability_criteria.description: Throughput of the current step is considered stable once these criteria are met.
